summary: Complete E2E testing of SSE streaming feature and all existing functionality. SSE endpoint at GET /api/test/stream?profile=warmup verified working with proper event types (status, send_progress, result_batch, stats, complete). Frontend EventSource integration displays real-time progress indicator and incrementally updates results. All 8 tabs (Home, Live Testing, Architecture, Optimizations, Terraform, Course, About Matt, Bulava) render correctly. Test history populated from SSE endpoint saving to MongoDB.

minor.issue: AWS ResourceConflictException when trying to set Provisioned Concurrency - SnapStart enabled functions don't support PC. Non-blocking, just logs errors.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after brief delay

passed_tests: GET /api/test/stream?profile=warmup returns proper SSE events (status, send_progress, result_batch, stats, complete)
SSE endpoint returns correct content-type: text/event-stream
SSE status event contains phase, message, total fields
SSE complete event contains sent, received, throughput, latencies fields
SSE stats event contains stats, distribution, latency_breakdown, bottleneck_analysis
Frontend Run Test button triggers SSE streaming
Frontend displays real-time streaming progress indicator during test
Results (stats, charts, latency breakdown, bottleneck analysis) display correctly after streaming completes
Test History panel populated from SSE endpoint saving to MongoDB
GET /api/test-history returns list of past runs with correct structure
GET /api/ returns Hello World
POST /api/heartbeat returns provisioned_concurrency and status
GET /api/pc-status returns current_pc and status
POST /api/warmup returns success and message
POST /api/bulava/augment returns augmentation with text, tier, type
GET /api/bulava/categories returns ad_categories and augmentation_types
GET /api/bulava/analytics returns total_augmentations, by_category, by_type
All 8 tabs (Home, Live Testing, Architecture, Optimizations, Terraform, Course, About Matt, Bulava) render correctly
Navigation between tabs works without errors
Bulava augmentation demo works - generate button and batch button functional

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All SSE streaming, tabs, history, Bulava features verified)

seed_data_creation: Multiple warmup test runs created during testing - 44+ history entries in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE streaming fully implemented and working. Key endpoint: GET /api/test/stream?profile=warmup. Frontend uses EventSource API to consume SSE stream. Events: status (phase, message, total), send_progress (sent, total), result_batch (received, total, new_latencies, batch_avg), stats (stats, distribution, latency_breakdown, bottleneck_analysis), complete (sent, received, throughput, latencies). Frontend data-testid selectors: stream-progress, latency-stacked-bar, bottleneck-analysis, test-history-panel, toggle-history-btn, history-table. All 13 pytest tests pass. Note: Recharts has cosmetic console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - not a functional issue.
